blocks.content:
Day advanced to 2026-03-16.
7,847 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-15 -> 2026-03-16)

- "Which club will Arsenal face in the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals, if Arsenal advance, by March 17, 2026?" → Sporting Lisbon
- "What refinery will reports link to the March 17 fatal explosion after oily water overflowed onto a road on Mexico’s Gulf coast, by March 31, 2026?" → Olmeca refinery
- "What will the U.S. bill proposed by Senator Chris Murphy and Representative Greg Casar to ban certain sensitive-event prediction-market bets be called by March 2026?" → BETS OFF Act
- "Which U.S. agency will be named by March 31, 2026 as the one a former director says he quit over opposition to war?" → National Counterterrorism Center
- "Which country will say it will appeal the 2025 AFCON title ruling to the Court of Arbitration for Sport by March 2026?" → Senegal
- "Which Israeli official will say that a senior Iranian official was killed in an overnight strike by March 20, 2026?" → Israel Katz
- "Where in central Israel will two people be reported killed in Iran's overnight missile attack by March 18, 2026?" → Ramat Gan

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (285 resolved, 45 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
